## [00:00 - 03:00]

And then you can do things like free and fast shipping, you know, instant download if it's an info product or any other type of benefit that really gives them an extra push that why they should make this decision right now. Make sure that, you know, there's a really big order button, so it's very easy for them to push that CTA. You've got information about the payments that are 100% secure. You know, you can use the little lock icon or other icons that basically give them, give it a bit more credibility.
